candidates.why: Direct total revenue line and a standard top-line revenue label.
Not revenue; this is direct cost and therefore not appropriate for REVT.
Direct sales/top-line label; suitable as a revenue line and may be the more specific label used across years.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list. 'Sales of Goods & Services - Net' is the most specific top-line sales label; 'Total Revenue' is included as fallback if labeling changes across years.

candidates.why: Direct cost-of-sales line and the best match for COGS.

variables.notes: Direct match for cost of goods sold / cost of sales.

candidates.why: Personnel overhead component; valid SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related stock compensation component; valid SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A line. Although preview values are empty, the row exists and may be populated in some years.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Per rule hierarchy, an explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in the preview, so included it and added overhead components to improve year coverage. Excluded depreciation/amortization and totals/balancing rows.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears on the provided Income Statement.

candidates.why: Best direct match for interest expense; preferred primary XINT line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related line but narrower than total interest expense; suitable only as fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure rather than the main reported interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value line; not preferred when a direct interest expense row exists.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Using priority-list treatment for XINT. 'Interest expenses' is the preferred reported line. Lease-liability interest is retained only as a fallback for possible label changes; excluded supplemental and balancing rows from final choice.

candidates.why: Income statement line, not book equity.
Income statement line, not book equity.
Equity component, not total/book equity, and appears empty.
Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interest when available.
Acceptable only if no parent/shareholders equity line exists; here a better owner-equity line exists.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' because it is more specific owner/shareholder equity and helps avoid double counting with MIB. Included 'Total Equity' only as fallback if labeling changes across years.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not the preferred balance-sheet non-controlling interest line for MIB.
Income statement attribution line, not the preferred balance-sheet non-controlling interest line for MIB.

variables.notes: No balance-sheet non-controlling interest / minority interest line is present. Because BE uses 'Shareholders' Equity - Total', setting MIB to [] avoids double counting and is consistent with the provided statements.
